summary: Comprehensive testing of bug fixes for UAE e-commerce platform: 1) Checkout error when adding products to cart - FIXED (missing MessageSquare and Send imports added), 2) Header profile and cart icons hide/blend on hover - FIXED (updated hover styles to hover:text-white hover:bg-gold). Cart-to-enquiry feature fully functional when payments are disabled.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all header elements visible
Cart icon visible and clickable in header
Login/Profile icon visible and clickable in header
Header icons remain visible on hover (Issue 2 FIXED) - now shows white icon on gold background
Add to Cart button works on product detail page
Cart badge updates correctly when items added
Cart page displays items with correct prices and quantities
Cart page shows VAT (5%) and shipping calculations
Checkout page loads without errors (Issue 1 FIXED)
Checkout page shows 'Submit Enquiry' title when payments disabled
Checkout page shows info banner about enquiry process
Submit Enquiry button displayed instead of Place Order
Enquiry form accepts customer details (name, email, phone, address)
Enquiry submission works and redirects to confirmation page
Enquiry confirmation page shows reference number and next steps
Backend /api/settings returns payment_enabled: false, cod_enabled: false
Backend /api/cart-enquiry endpoint exists and accepts enquiries
Backend /api/products endpoint returns products correctly
Backend /api/categories endpoint returns categories correctly
Cart add/update/remove operations work correctly
Admin login works with admin@gpgt.ae / admin123
critical_code_review_comments: Issue 1 Fix verified: MessageSquare and Send icons imported in App.js line 11 - checkout page now renders correctly
Issue 2 Fix verified: Header.js buttons use 'hover:text-white hover:bg-gold' instead of 'hover:text-gold' - icons now visible on hover with gold background
Cart-to-enquiry flow well implemented with clear user messaging
EnquiryConfirmationPage provides good UX with 'What Happens Next' section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported issues are now fixed: 1) Checkout page renders correctly with MessageSquare and Send imports, 2) Header icons visible on hover with white-on-gold styling. Cart-to-enquiry feature works end-to-end when payment_enabled and cod_enabled are both false. Enquiry submissions are stored in cart_enquiries collection and admin receives email notifications.

features_verified.issue_1_checkout_error: FIXED - MessageSquare and Send imports added to App.js
features_verified.issue_2_header_icons_hover: FIXED - Icons now show white on gold background on hover
features_verified.add_to_cart: PASS - Products can be added to cart
features_verified.cart_page: PASS - Displays items, quantities, prices, VAT, shipping
features_verified.checkout_enquiry_mode: PASS - Shows 'Submit Enquiry' when payments disabled
features_verified.enquiry_submission: PASS - Form submits and redirects to confirmation
features_verified.enquiry_confirmation: PASS - Shows reference number and next steps
features_verified.cart_badge: PASS - Updates correctly when items added

hover_style_verification.result: Icons clearly visible on hover - ISSUE FIXED
